title: Remove residual drag-and-drop artifacts after click-selection migration
goal: Delete the remaining drag-and-drop remnants that are no longer part of the current click-selection runtime, without changing current gameplay behavior. Because the worktree is already dirty, isolate the task on a dedicated cleanup branch after snapshotting the current state.
constraints: Do not work directly on main; snapshot the current dirty worktree first, then use a dedicated cleanup branch
Treat draggable={false} on background images as native browser drag prevention, not legacy DnD
Do not touch GameKitchenView 3D transform order or preserve-3d chain unless strictly required
Do not rewrite old Supabase migrations in this task
No extra cleanup outside drag-and-drop remnants unless it is directly adjacent and proven unused
acceptance: src no longer contains runtime/type-level DnD remnants for the draggable guard or drag_start/drop_success
src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts is either removed as unused or stripped of the draggable-specific logic after a full reference search
src/types/db.ts no longer contains drag_start or drop_success in ActionLogType
Legacy AreaDefinition hitbox contract in src/types/db.ts is removed if it remains unreferenced after full-code verification
Background image behavior in game/admin remains unchanged
